strategy_summary: The shells of the rough fileclam aid movement through water via jet propulsion. “When danger threatens, this scallop claps its shells together and darts through the water, like a pair of castanets with a life of their own.” (Downer 2002:14)
mechanism:
The shells of the rough fileclam aid movement through water via jet propulsion.

“When danger threatens, this scallop claps its shells together and darts through the water, like a pair of castanets with a life of their own.” (Downer 2002:14)
